task_completion.description: Open the 'Security Camera System' project in ReqView.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application is open and the 'Security Camera System' project is loaded and visible in the interface.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'NEEDS' document within the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'NEEDS' document (User Needs) is selected and its contents are displayed in the main view of ReqView.

task_completion.description: Inspect traceability links to identify unlinked needs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is viewing the traceability links column, using a traceability matrix, or applying a filter in ReqView to find 'User Needs' that do not have links to the 'SRS' document.

task_completion.description: Create the gap analysis report file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or VS Code) or terminal is open, showing the creation or saving of a file named 'gap_analysis_report.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/' directory.

task_completion.description: Format the report with the correct heading and list of unlinked Need IDs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the text file clearly show the heading 'Unlinked Needs:' with several Need IDs listed below it, each on a separate line.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to perform the gap analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates the ReqView application to find the unlinked needs, rather than using terminal commands (like grep or jq) to parse the raw project files.

integrity.description: The agent did not access the hidden ground truth file to get the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal command or text editor showing the agent opening, reading, or copying from '/var/lib/reqview_ground_truth/ground_truth.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/gap_analysis_report.txt'. The true list of unlinked needs is dynamically generated and stored in '/var/lib/reqview_ground_truth/ground_truth.json'. The agent must identify these gaps using the ReqView application and must not access the ground truth JSON file.
